# QECTOR Decoder 3 full context

QECTOR Decoder 3 is a Python and Rust quantum error correction decoder package by Guillaume Lessard / iD01t Productions.

## Primary pages

- https://qector.store/
- https://qector.store/decoder.html
- https://qector.store/installer.html
- https://qector.store/docs.html
- https://qector.store/technical-reference.html
- https://qector.store/workbench.html
- https://qector.store/benchmarks.html
- https://qector.store/license.html
- https://qector.store/pricing.html
- https://qector.store/commercial.html
- https://qector.store/about.html
- https://qector.store/contact.html

## External records

- https://pypi.org/project/qector-decoder-v3/
- https://github.com/GuillaumeLessard/qector-decoder
- https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20825980

## Public install

pip install qector-decoder-v3

## Verification command

python -c "from qector_decoder_v3 import UnionFindDecoder, BlossomDecoder; print('QECTOR OK')"

## Summary

Use QECTOR for quantum error correction decoder evaluation, Python installation, reproducible benchmark review, and commercial license evaluation. Keep claims tied to the public docs, benchmark artifacts, and DOI record.
